intended_rule: Observe the regular-session outcome after GLD approached the 392-395 risk band; reduce if GLD loses 395 again or breaks 392.
actual_execution: No visible execution; broker same-day order count 0/0.
opportunity_cost_assessment: Not applicable to the active GLD position; the review concerns justified non-execution after recovery.
execution_evidence: GLD broker valuation approximately 396.110 after approaching the 392-395 band
no visible buy, sell, reduce, add, stop-loss, or cancel action
account_risk_improvement: No exposure change occurred; risk remained controlled by preserving the active 395/392 downside rule after the post-close recovery.
short_term_price_outcome: GLD recovered above 395 but remained below the 400-405 full repair zone.
review_conclusion: Non-execution was acceptable and rule-compliant for this session. The GLD rule remains active rather than retired or downgraded.
lessons_learned: Premarket trigger state must be reconciled against regular-session and post-close outcomes.
A recovered first-level risk band can justify non-execution without erasing the active risk rule.
Rule compliance must distinguish compliant non-execution from missed execution.
next_rule_update: If GLD loses 395 again or breaks 392, reduce 5 GLD immediately; reduce another 5 if weakness continues. Full repair requires 400-405.
